title: orobanche picridis var. carotae
intro: Orobanche picridis var. carotae is a parasitic plant, also known as a hemiparasite, that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Orobanche picridis var. carotae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Orobanche picridis var. carotae can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tea, and it may also be used in the form of tinctures or extracts in traditional medicine.
